title: 98point6 - AI-Powered Primary Care
problem: Primary care access is expensive and time-consuming. Patients delay care due to cost and inconvenience.
solution: AI-assisted primary care platform. AI handles initial intake, human doctors review and provide diagnosis/treatment. Text-based consultations.
technology: AI intake, chat-based consultations, EHR, asynchronous care
regulatory_notes: HIPAA, state medical licensing, telemedicine regulations
varden_fit: HIGH - AI-assisted primary care. Infrastructure for scalable primary care delivery.
notes: boring_software=false, contrarian=true. AI-first primary care with human review. Contrarian: text-based vs video, AI intake vs human triage.
